center.name: 赞比西河
center.summary: 赞比西河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括非洲冠鵰、南红嘴犀鸟、Olive bee-eater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: superciliosus occurs in eastern Ethiopia, Somalia and Kenya, and southwards through East Africa to southern Mozambique and the Zambezi Valley, as well as the Comoro Islands and Madagascar; M

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in the upper Zambezi valley of Mozambique, but is mostly absent from the eastern lowlands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: BirdLife South Africa and Avian Demography Unit, Johannesburg, South Africa. In Zimbabwe, the crowned eagle can be found in quite open woods with Adansonia trees and may occasionally forage in savanna and secondary growth. In Malawi, highland birds forage in lower miombo woodland, and lower altitudes, breeding occurs in deciduous forest, more locally in dense miombo, tall riparian woodlands, and in remnants close to cultivation. Crowned eagles in Zambezi, occurs in evergreen forest in the eastern highlands, in rugged, hilly terrain over the central plateau, in hills and escarpments in the southeastern portions of the central watershed, and in riparian habitat along the larger rivers.{{cite book|author=Irwin, M
